overall_assessment: No blocking performance or operational-fit findings in the bounded package. Sent-status hydration is occurrence-scoped, authenticated-inviter scoped, capped, index-backed, uses bulk recipient projection, avoids global post-auth refresh, and dedupes same-key in-flight Flutter refreshes.
recommended_path: Resolve TQA-BLK-001 with a focused negative regression test and rerun audit; keep real-device and full CI-equivalent execution as promotion gates.
